trans-unit.source: Sketch Map Tool Exercise 2 - Traffic light
trans-unit.target: Sketch Map Tool Exercise 2 - Traffic light

trans-unit.source: This exercise focuses on the first step of working with the Sketch Map Tool “Create a Sketch Map” and especially the characteristics, differences, weaknesses and strengths of the satellite and the OSM basemap.
trans-unit.target: This exercise focuses on the first step of working with the Sketch Map Tool “Create a Sketch Map” and especially the characteristics, differences, weaknesses and strengths of the satellite and the OSM basemap.

trans-unit.source: Characteristics of the exercise
trans-unit.target: Characteristics of the exercise

trans-unit.source: Get familiar with the OSM and Satellite-image base maps and the Quality reports.
trans-unit.target: Get familiar with the OSM and Satellite-image base maps and the Quality reports.

trans-unit.source: Get a feeling about how to assess the suitability of a basemaps and familiarise yourself with possible problems.
trans-unit.target: Get a feeling about how to assess the suitability of a basemaps and familiarise yourself with possible problems.

trans-unit.source: Get a first introduction to quality analysis :::
trans-unit.target: Get a first introduction to quality analysis :::

trans-unit.source: ::::{grid} 2 :::{grid-item-card} __Type of trainings exercise:__ ^^^ This exercise can be used in online and in presence, and is focused on group discussions. :::
trans-unit.target: ::::{grid} 2 :::{grid-item-card} __Type of trainings exercise:__ ^^^ This exercise can be used in online and in presence, and is focused on group discussions. :::

trans-unit.source: :::{grid-item-card} __Focus group (GIS-Knowlege Level):__ ^^^ Planners/Facilitators (Beginners-level: no knowledge required about QGIS)
trans-unit.target: :::{grid-item-card} __Focus group (GIS-Knowlege Level):__ ^^^ Planners/Facilitators (Beginners-level: no knowledge required about QGIS)

trans-unit.source: ::::{grid} 2 :::{grid-item-card} __Estimated time demand for the exercise:__ ^^^ About 20 min in groups + each group 5 min to present + 10 min general discussion/buffer
trans-unit.target: ::::{grid} 2 :::{grid-item-card} __Estimated time demand for the exercise:__ ^^^ About 20 min in groups + each group 5 min to present + 10 min general discussion/buffer

trans-unit.source: [Introductory slides on the Sketch Map Tool](https://nexus.heigit.org/repository/gis-training-resource-center/mobile_data_collection/sketch_map_tool/PPP/Introduction_Sketch_Map_Tool_21_03.pptx)
trans-unit.target: [Introductory slides on the Sketch Map Tool](https://nexus.heigit.org/repository/gis-training-resource-center/mobile_data_collection/sketch_map_tool/PPP/Introduction_Sketch_Map_Tool_21_03.pptx)

trans-unit.source: Case Studies Maps:
trans-unit.target: Case Studies Maps:

trans-unit.source: [Case Study Map 1](https://nexus.heigit.org/repository/gis-training-resource-center/mobile_data_collection/sketch_map_tool_training/Sketch_Map_Tool_Exercise_2-3/Case_1_Sudan.zip),
trans-unit.target: [Case Study Map 1](https://nexus.heigit.org/repository/gis-training-resource-center/mobile_data_collection/sketch_map_tool_training/Sketch_Map_Tool_Exercise_2-3/Case_1_Sudan.zip),

trans-unit.source: [Case Study Map 2](https://nexus.heigit.org/repository/gis-training-resource-center/mobile_data_collection/sketch_map_tool_training/Sketch_Map_Tool_Exercise_2-3/Case_2_Bolivien.zip),
trans-unit.target: [Case Study Map 2](https://nexus.heigit.org/repository/gis-training-resource-center/mobile_data_collection/sketch_map_tool_training/Sketch_Map_Tool_Exercise_2-3/Case_2_Bolivien.zip),

trans-unit.source: [Case Study Map 3](https://nexus.heigit.org/repository/gis-training-resource-center/mobile_data_collection/sketch_map_tool_training/Sketch_Map_Tool_Exercise_2-3/Case_3_Port_Harcourt.zip),
trans-unit.target: [Case Study Map 3](https://nexus.heigit.org/repository/gis-training-resource-center/mobile_data_collection/sketch_map_tool_training/Sketch_Map_Tool_Exercise_2-3/Case_3_Port_Harcourt.zip),

trans-unit.source: [Case Study Map 4](https://nexus.heigit.org/repository/gis-training-resource-center/mobile_data_collection/sketch_map_tool_training/Sketch_Map_Tool_Exercise_2_and_3/Case_4_Borgo_San_Lorenzo.zip),
trans-unit.target: [Case Study Map 4](https://nexus.heigit.org/repository/gis-training-resource-center/mobile_data_collection/sketch_map_tool_training/Sketch_Map_Tool_Exercise_2_and_3/Case_4_Borgo_San_Lorenzo.zip),

trans-unit.source: [Case Study Map 5](https://nexus.heigit.org/repository/gis-training-resource-center/mobile_data_collection/sketch_map_tool_training/Sketch_Map_Tool_Exercise_2_and_3/Case_5_Adelaide.zip)
trans-unit.target: [Case Study Map 5](https://nexus.heigit.org/repository/gis-training-resource-center/mobile_data_collection/sketch_map_tool_training/Sketch_Map_Tool_Exercise_2_and_3/Case_5_Adelaide.zip)

trans-unit.source: [Printable exercise factsheet](https://nexus.heigit.org/repository/gis-training-resource-center/mobile_data_collection/sketch_map_tool_training/Factsheet_printing_%20Ex_2.pdf)
trans-unit.target: [Printable exercise factsheet](https://nexus.heigit.org/repository/gis-training-resource-center/mobile_data_collection/sketch_map_tool_training/Factsheet_printing_%20Ex_2.pdf)

trans-unit.source: Instructions for the trainers
trans-unit.target: Instructions for the trainers

trans-unit.source: :::{dropdown} __Trainers Corner__
trans-unit.target: :::{dropdown} __Trainers Corner__

trans-unit.source: Prepare the training
trans-unit.target: Prepare the training

trans-unit.source: Online access and devices (PC) to be able to use the Sketch Map Tool and create maps online.
trans-unit.target: Online access and devices (PC) to be able to use the Sketch Map Tool and create maps online.

trans-unit.source: For each group one individual set of the Sketch Maps (OSM + satellite) digitally or as a print and reports of one area OSM + satellite-map and the fitting report.
trans-unit.target: For each group one individual set of the Sketch Maps (OSM + satellite) digitally or as a print and reports of one area OSM + satellite-map and the fitting report.

trans-unit.source: Take a look and make yourself familiar on the provided material for the exercise and the Sketch Map Tool in general. There are 5 case study maps available which contain each two sketch maps (one based on OSM, one on satellite imagery) and the respective Quality Report
trans-unit.target: Take a look and make yourself familiar on the provided material for the exercise and the Sketch Map Tool in general. There are 5 case study maps available which contain each two sketch maps (one based on OSM, one on satellite imagery) and the respective Quality Report

trans-unit.source: Prepare a board (it can be a white board/flipchart/or digital e.g. Miro-board) where the participants can add their findings.
trans-unit.target: Prepare a board (it can be a white board/flipchart/or digital e.g. Miro-board) where the participants can add their findings.

trans-unit.source: Check out [How to do trainings?](/content/Trainers_corner/en_how_to_training.md) for some general tips on training conduction
trans-unit.target: Check out [How to do trainings?](/content/Trainers_corner/en_how_to_training.md) for some general tips on training conduction

trans-unit.source: Conduct the training:
trans-unit.target: Conduct the training:

trans-unit.source: __Introduction:__
trans-unit.target: __Introduction:__

trans-unit.source: Make sure everyone is familiar with the basic understanding about OSM and satellite maps. Introduce the aim of the exercise and the idea of the traffic lights and the analysis before you start the exercise!
trans-unit.target: Make sure everyone is familiar with the basic understanding about OSM and satellite maps. Introduce the aim of the exercise and the idea of the traffic lights and the analysis before you start the exercise!

trans-unit.source: Provide access to the needed material and build groups of 3 to 6 people in order to discuss the findings.
trans-unit.target: Provide access to the needed material and build groups of 3 to 6 people in order to discuss the findings.

trans-unit.source: __Time for group work:__
trans-unit.target: __Time for group work:__

trans-unit.source: Check-in with the groups to see if there are any questions or problems.
trans-unit.target: Check-in with the groups to see if there are any questions or problems.

trans-unit.source: Prepare the presentation tool (e.g. Miro, White-board, etc.) for the wrap-up.
trans-unit.target: Prepare the presentation tool (e.g. Miro, White-board, etc.) for the wrap-up.

trans-unit.source: __Wrap up:__
trans-unit.target: __Wrap up:__

trans-unit.source: All groups present their findings (each 5 min, make it short but display the maps they are talking about).
trans-unit.target: All groups present their findings (each 5 min, make it short but display the maps they are talking about).

trans-unit.source: Discuss benefits, as well as challenges and problems in the use of the Sketch Map Tool.
trans-unit.target: Discuss benefits, as well as challenges and problems in the use of the Sketch Map Tool.

trans-unit.source: Time to for open questions. ::::
trans-unit.target: Time to for open questions. ::::

trans-unit.source: What you need to know - Background information
trans-unit.target: What you need to know - Background information

trans-unit.source: Characteristics of the two base maps
trans-unit.target: Characteristics of the two base maps

trans-unit.source: Satellite imagery
trans-unit.target: Satellite imagery

trans-unit.source: OSM data
trans-unit.target: OSM data

trans-unit.source: Data source
trans-unit.target: Data source

trans-unit.source: [World Imagery ESRI](https://www.arcgis.com/home/item.html?id=10df2279f9684e4a9f6a7f08febac2a9#!)
trans-unit.target: [World Imagery ESRI](https://www.arcgis.com/home/item.html?id=10df2279f9684e4a9f6a7f08febac2a9#!)

trans-unit.source: [OpenStreetMap Community](https://www.openstreetmap.org/#map=6/51.330/10.453)
trans-unit.target: [OpenStreetMap Community](https://www.openstreetmap.org/#map=6/51.330/10.453)

trans-unit.source: Example map
trans-unit.target: Example map

trans-unit.source: Currentness
trans-unit.target: Currentness

trans-unit.source: The satellite imagery is typically within 3-5 years of currency.
trans-unit.target: The satellite imagery is typically within 3-5 years of currency.

trans-unit.source: Current OSM-data is used in the base map.
trans-unit.target: Current OSM-data is used in the base map.

trans-unit.source: Biggest benefit
trans-unit.target: Biggest benefit

trans-unit.source: Impression of the landscape and topography
trans-unit.target: Impression of the landscape and topography

trans-unit.source: Clear outlines and at times labels especially of important infrastructure e.g. hospitals, possibility to improve the map by contributing to OSM.
trans-unit.target: Clear outlines and at times labels especially of important infrastructure e.g. hospitals, possibility to improve the map by contributing to OSM.

trans-unit.source: What does georeferenced mean?
trans-unit.target: What does georeferenced mean?

trans-unit.source: Non-Georeferenced image
trans-unit.target: Non-Georeferenced image

trans-unit.source: Georeferenced image – GeoTIFF
trans-unit.target: Georeferenced image – GeoTIFF

trans-unit.source: This is just an image, even if you load it into QGIS and give it a coordination system it can´t be located and the image is shown somewhere in the Atlantic.
trans-unit.target: This is just an image, even if you load it into QGIS and give it a coordination system it can´t be located and the image is shown somewhere in the Atlantic.

trans-unit.source: The file contains information about its coordinate system and its location, so you can combine it with other geodata e.g. with GPS data.
trans-unit.target: The file contains information about its coordinate system and its location, so you can combine it with other geodata e.g. with GPS data.

trans-unit.source: Map Quality Check
trans-unit.target: Map Quality Check

trans-unit.source: The Sketch Map Tool can evaluate how well-suited an area of the [OpenStreetMap (OSM)](https://www.openstreetmap.org/#map=6/51.330/10.453) basemap is for participatory mapping based on a quality analysis of the OpenStreetMap (OSM) basemap data through the [HeiGIT ohsome quality analyst](https://heigit.org/big-spatial-data-analytics-en/ohsome/ohsome-quality-analyst-oqt/).
trans-unit.target: The Sketch Map Tool can evaluate how well-suited an area of the [OpenStreetMap (OSM)](https://www.openstreetmap.org/#map=6/51.330/10.453) basemap is for participatory mapping based on a quality analysis of the OpenStreetMap (OSM) basemap data through the [HeiGIT ohsome quality analyst](https://heigit.org/big-spatial-data-analytics-en/ohsome/ohsome-quality-analyst-oqt/).

trans-unit.source: The Map Quality Check assists in evaluating the suitability of the area of interest for participatory mapping through a quality analysis of the OpenStreetMap data with the HeiGIT ohsome quality analyst. The fitness report can be downloaded as a PDF file by clicking on the blue button. It provides an evaluation of the suitability of the local OSM data and recommendations for subsequent field data collection.
trans-unit.target: The Map Quality Check assists in evaluating the suitability of the area of interest for participatory mapping through a quality analysis of the OpenStreetMap data with the HeiGIT ohsome quality analyst. The fitness report can be downloaded as a PDF file by clicking on the blue button. It provides an evaluation of the suitability of the local OSM data and recommendations for subsequent field data collection.

trans-unit.source: Step-by step introduction for participants
trans-unit.target: Step-by step introduction for participants

trans-unit.source: Download [here](https://nexus.heigit.org/repository/gis-training-resource-center/mobile_data_collection/sketch_map_tool_training/Factsheet_printing_%20Ex_2.pdf) a printable factsheet to guide you through this exercise.
trans-unit.target: Download [here](https://nexus.heigit.org/repository/gis-training-resource-center/mobile_data_collection/sketch_map_tool_training/Factsheet_printing_%20Ex_2.pdf) a printable factsheet to guide you through this exercise.

trans-unit.source: If you experiences any problems during your use of the [Sketch Map Tool](https://sketch-map-tool.heigit.org/) please take a look at the [Help page](https://sketch-map-tool.heigit.org/help).
trans-unit.target: If you experiences any problems during your use of the [Sketch Map Tool](https://sketch-map-tool.heigit.org/) please take a look at the [Help page](https://sketch-map-tool.heigit.org/help).

trans-unit.source: 1. Create the maps and reports
trans-unit.target: 1. Create the maps and reports

trans-unit.source: Open the [Sketch Map Tool](https://sketch-map-tool.heigit.org/)
trans-unit.target: Open the [Sketch Map Tool](https://sketch-map-tool.heigit.org/)

trans-unit.source: With you group, decide on an area fitting to your case-study. You can also choose an area you know very well or find interesting.
trans-unit.target: With you group, decide on an area fitting to your case-study. You can also choose an area you know very well or find interesting.

trans-unit.source: Zoom in and select your map area: Try different zoom levels and change the orientation.
trans-unit.target: Zoom in and select your map area: Try different zoom levels and change the orientation.

trans-unit.source: Create several maps of the same area with different orientation, zoom-level or basemaps.
trans-unit.target: Create several maps of the same area with different orientation, zoom-level or basemaps.

trans-unit.source: Sketch Map with a satellite base map
trans-unit.target: Sketch Map with a satellite base map

trans-unit.source: Sketch Map with a OSM base map
trans-unit.target: Sketch Map with a OSM base map

trans-unit.source: Map Quality Check
trans-unit.target: Map Quality Check

trans-unit.source: 2. Collect your insights to the following questions
trans-unit.target: 2. Collect your insights to the following questions

trans-unit.source: Add your insights to a presentation or share it on a (digital) board:
trans-unit.target: Add your insights to a presentation or share it on a (digital) board:

trans-unit.source: Which difference can you detect between satellite and OSM basemaps?
trans-unit.target: Which difference can you detect between satellite and OSM basemaps?

trans-unit.source: What are the main characteristics of the area you see on the basemap? Describe separately both basemaps, the one with the satellite imagery and the OSM data.
trans-unit.target: What are the main characteristics of the area you see on the basemap? Describe separately both basemaps, the one with the satellite imagery and the OSM data.

trans-unit.source: Could you orient yourself on the basemap? Are there points of interests / something you could use as orientation point?
trans-unit.target: Could you orient yourself on the basemap? Are there points of interests / something you could use as orientation point?

trans-unit.source: Would you say the basemaps are suited for participatory mapping? Reason your answer and think about participants that are not familiar with basemaps.
trans-unit.target: Would you say the basemaps are suited for participatory mapping? Reason your answer and think about participants that are not familiar with basemaps.

trans-unit.source: In which use cases would you prefer the OSM basemap?
trans-unit.target: In which use cases would you prefer the OSM basemap?

trans-unit.source: In which use cases would you prefer the Satellite basemap?
trans-unit.target: In which use cases would you prefer the Satellite basemap?

trans-unit.source: What traffic light colour would you give the satellite and OSM basemap individually for this area?
trans-unit.target: What traffic light colour would you give the satellite and OSM basemap individually for this area?

trans-unit.source: Discuss the OSM-Mapping-suitability-report:
trans-unit.target: Discuss the OSM-Mapping-suitability-report:

trans-unit.source: What is the overall result of the basemap? (Which colour of the traffic light?)
trans-unit.target: What is the overall result of the basemap? (Which colour of the traffic light?)

trans-unit.source: What are your most important findings from the OSM-Mapping-suitability-report?
trans-unit.target: What are your most important findings from the OSM-Mapping-suitability-report?

trans-unit.source: Would it make sense to organise a mapathon beforehand to improve the OSM data?
trans-unit.target: Would it make sense to organise a mapathon beforehand to improve the OSM data?

trans-unit.source: 3. Wrap-up:
trans-unit.target: 3. Wrap-up:

trans-unit.source: Make some notes and prepare yourself for a short presentation of your maps to share with the other participants:
trans-unit.target: Make some notes and prepare yourself for a short presentation of your maps to share with the other participants:

trans-unit.source: Prepare your Presentation and decide who is going to present.
trans-unit.target: Prepare your Presentation and decide who is going to present.

trans-unit.source: Think about open questions, as well as feedback to the exercise
trans-unit.target: Think about open questions, as well as feedback to the exercise
